object_under_evaluation: integrity of aoa-memo write-path guardrails on local candidate to reviewed corpus landing routes
claim_boundary: On this bounded write-path family, aoa-memo can show source refs, reviewed-write landing gates, and access-plane authority split, but the risk-marker surface still needs more packet-backed coverage before broad poisoning resistance can be claimed.
limitations: This report does not prove general memory poisoning resistance.
This report does not prove final source truth.
This report does not prove KAG, RAG, vector, or graph retrieval correctness.
This report does not prove role authorization outside memo operation mode.
strongest_guardrail_signal: Reviewed landing rejects candidate-only, untrusted, missing-evidence, and missing-receipt packets before durable corpus object creation.
strongest_write_path_risk: Risk markers for indirect prompt injection, sleeper memory, poisoned experience, and action-safety separation still need wider packet-backed validation.

case_notes.read_path: local memo export -> reviewed intake copy -> landing receipt -> memo object
case_notes.trust_note: Source refs and source trust remain visible before landing.
case_notes.risk_note: Basic risk posture is represented, but not every poisoning subtype is machine-required yet.
case_notes.lineage_note: Candidate and export refs preserve derivation walkback into the local port.
case_notes.action_note: No action is executed by the landing route.
case_notes.result_note: The durable result appears only through aoa-memo reviewed landing.

case_notes.read_path: write-path guardrail docs -> candidate packet -> validator
case_notes.trust_note: The route names untrusted and unknown source posture.
case_notes.risk_note: The risk taxonomy is clear, while some fields remain stronger in docs than in enforced packet shape.
case_notes.lineage_note: Source refs exist, but derivation lineage needs broader explicit cases.
case_notes.action_note: Action text is routed as data by doctrine, with more machine checks still needed.
case_notes.result_note: The route is inspectable but not yet a broad poisoning-resistance proof.
